nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: Golden Pheasant
nodes.summary: Golden Pheasant是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Golden Pheasant。

nodes.name: Golden Pheasant
nodes.summary: Golden Pheasant may refer to: Golden pheasant, also known as the Chinese pheasant, species of gamebird from China Golden Pheasant (beer), Slovak beer Golden Pheasant (horse), racehorse Golden Pheasant Award, the highest award given by the Scout Association of Japan Operation Golden Pheasant, 1988 U.S. military operation in Honduras against the Sandinistas
